steps_detail.result_preview:
### Result
"clicked"
### Ran Playwright code
```js
await page.evaluate('() => { const input = document.querySelector(\'input[placeholder*="Où allez-vous"], input[placeholder*="destination"], input[name="dest"]\'); if (input) { input.click(); input.focus(); return \'clicked\'; } return \'not found\'; }');
```
